result.stdout:
Status of Azure DevOps Builds at 04:43 for organisation 

Arguments: 
--help, -h           Display this help.
--url, -u            Set the Azure DevOps URL. By default: https://dev.azure.com.
--organization, -o   Set the organisation name.
--pat, -p            Set the security PAT key.
                     Go to Azure DevOps / Your profile / Security / Personal Access Token
                     and create a new token with 'Build Read' and 'Release Read' authorizations.
